title: Backstage Details On Trey Miguel's AEW Release, Frustration Behind The Scenes
summary: A new report shed some light on Trey Miguel's AEW release, after it was confirmed the decision came from above the company and Tony Khan.

title: AEW's Leila Grey Provides Update On ACL Injury, Reveals Exact Moment It Happened
summary: AEW's Leila Grey provides an update on her torn ACL injury, and also reveals to fans the exact moment it happened in her match with Mercedes Mone
